pages.title: USIS All Pages Index
pages.summary: Alphabetical tour of all first-party pages in this tree with one-line descriptions. Regenerate via tools/apply_usis_site_guides.py after adding pages.

pages.title: USIS Procurement
pages.summary: Hub for Sage-style procurement: POs, subcontracts, and RFPs; edit per job on construction/project-detail.html (Procurement tab: PO / Subcontract / RFP tools). API: /api/v1/projects/<id>/commitments, /api/v1/rfps.

pages.title: Construction — Project Detail
pages.summary: Active project shell: Job info, Schedule (installation windows + calendar), Tasks (W3CRM-style grid, same schedule-items API), drawings, takeoff, RFIs, Submittals (log), RFP, Procurement (PO / Subcontract / RFP inner tools), Contract admin (Sage-style prime/CO shell), job costing. Use ?id= project UUID.
